overview: NADMD uses intravenous NAD therapy to treat addiction, chronic degenerative diseases, and age-related decline. Dr. Milgram and his team of RNs provide customized NAD infusions combined with holistic and evidence-based treatments.
highlights: 10-day NAD IV detoxification program for addiction
Treatment for chronic degenerative diseases including Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, and CTE
targetAudience: Individuals seeking addiction recovery, treatment for chronic degenerative diseases, or anti-aging wellness.
